title: Two Sum
description: Given an array of integers nums and an integer target, return indices of the two numbers such that they add up to target.

title: Maximum Subarray
description: Find the contiguous subarray with the largest sum using Kadane's Algorithm.

title: Next Greater Element
description: For each element in an array, find the next greater element to its right.

title: Count Distinct Elements in Every Window
description: Given an array and window size k, count distinct elements in every window.

title: First Non Repeating Character
description: Find the first non repeating character in a string.

title: Longest Univalue Path
description: Find the length of the longest path where every node has the same value.

title: Search in Sorted Matrix
description: Search a value in a row-wise and column-wise sorted matrix.

title: Spiral Matrix Traversal
description: Print elements of a matrix in spiral order.

title: Number of Islands
description: Given a grid of 1s and 0s, count the number of islands.

title: Maximum Area of Island
description: Find the maximum area of an island in a grid.

title: Longest Common Prefix
description: Find the longest common prefix among an array of strings.

title: Longest Substring Without Repeating Characters
description: Find the longest substring without repeating characters.

title: Reverse Linked List
description: Reverse a singly linked list.

title: Merge K Sorted Lists
description: Merge k sorted linked lists into one sorted list.

title: Linked List Cycle Detection
description: Detect if a linked list has a cycle using Floyd's algorithm.

title: Zigzag Level Order Traversal
description: Return the zigzag level order traversal of a binary tree.

title: Subtree of Another Tree
description: Check if a tree is a subtree of another tree.

title: Top K Frequent Elements
description: Return the k most frequent elements in an array.

title: Search in Rotated Sorted Array
description: Search an element in a rotated sorted array.

title: Word Ladder
description: Find the shortest transformation sequence from beginWord to endWord using BFS.
